Initializer# init(point:in:)

iOS 16.0+iPadOS 16.0+Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.5+tvOS 9.0+visionOS 1.0+

```
init!(
    point: CGPoint,
    in context: JSContext!
)
```

## [Return Value](/documentation/JavaScriptCore/JSValue/init(point:in:)#return-value)

A newly allocated JavaScript object containing properties named x and y, with values from the CGPoint.

## [Discussion](/documentation/JavaScriptCore/JSValue/init(point:in:)#discussion)

Create a JSValue from a CGPoint.
